identityObservation.reason: GitHub authentication proves repository access only; no deployment owner record or production context binds this login to an operator role

accessGaps: GitHub organization action variable names unavailable without organization-admin permission
GitHub organization action secret names unavailable without organization-admin permission
GitHub organization container package metadata unavailable without read:packages
requiredOwnerSuppliedEvidence: literal production environment and NATS context/account/server/domain
read-only authoritative NATS inventory with rendered names, counts, and revisions
committed deployed semconnect revision and immutable semconnect/backend image digests
authoritative reseed URI, revision, SHA-256, expected entity count, owner, and literal command
maintenance window, rollback owner, prior committed revision, and prior image digests
named production operator plus architect, product-owner, operator, and two destructive-reviewer signatures over one complete immutable manifest hash
decision: NO-GO: discovery did not locate authoritative production deployment values
